name: io.github.gblinproject/gblin-mcp-server
description: Treasury standard for AI agents on Base mainnet. Park idle USDC in a cbBTC/WETH index with Crash Shield protection, JIT-swap to USDC for x402 invoice payments.

environmentVariables.name: GBLIN_RPC_URL
environmentVariables.description: RPC URL for Base mainnet. Falls back to public endpoint if not set.
